name: agent_attempts
note: The tool calls a CI agent attempts in one run. t1 and t2 are benign and needed. t3 is a dangerous command that writes outside the working directory. t4 is a needed build command whose subprocess reads a credential file, which a Read deny rule cannot reach but the sandbox can. t5 is a needed file edit that must be isolated to be revertible.

attempts.description: Read a source file under the project.
Delete a sibling directory outside the working directory.
Run the build, whose subprocess reads ~/.ssh/id_rsa from a compromised dependency.
Edit a source file in the working tree.
